title: A Slice of Life... Video Style
excerpt: A day in the life of us. I like the idea of making these vlogs on occasion, so let me know your thoughts! My goal is to keep them under 10 minutes, but clearly I failed at this one .…
body: A day in the life of us. I like the idea of making these vlogs on occasion, so let me know your thoughts! My goal is to keep them under 10 minutes, but clearly I failed at this one. Forgive me?
